name: What damages from low AI visibility for my LA practice?

mainEntity.name: What damages from low AI visibility for my LA practice?

acceptedAnswer.description: **Lost client inquiries as AI directs traffic to visible competitors, potentially 50-80% fewer leads.** Shift to AI search amplifies this. **Key factors:** 1) Market size; 2) Practice consumer-focus; 3) Competitor dominance; 4) Recovery time. Quantify via lead tracking, prioritize high-ROI listings. Damages compound without action.[3]
